name: @omadia/plugin-privacy-guard
description: Privacy Shield v4 core plugin for the byte5 Harness. Publishes the `privacy.redact@1` capability — a Data-Plane Boundary that interns raw tool results server-side, hands the LLM an identity-free Digest, runs identity-/order-critical work through a server-side Verb API, and emits a PII-free PrivacyReceipt for inline disclosure in Teams + Web channels.
